Caring for Your Smile,
Comforting Your Mind.

Experience professional dentistry in a welcoming and reassuring environment. At Surya Dental Care, your comfort and health are our highest priorities.

Schedule a Visit Our Services

Anxiety-Free Care

We specialize in easing patient anxiety with a gentle approach and clear communication.

Highly Professional

Our team is committed to punctual, professional service and the highest standards of care.

Clean & Calm Clinic

Enjoy a serene and impeccably clean environment designed for your comfort.

Our Comprehensive Dental Services

From routine check-ups to advanced treatments, we provide personalized care to meet all your dental needs.

Dental Implants

Restore your smile with our expert, long-lasting dental implant solutions.

Teeth Whitening

Brighten your smile with our safe and effective whitening treatments.

Routine Check-ups

Preventive care to maintain your oral health and catch issues early.

Pediatric Dentistry

Gentle and friendly care for our youngest patients.

Painless Procedures

We use modern techniques to ensure your comfort during every visit.

Clear Communication

We provide thorough explanations so you're always informed.

A Tradition of Genuine Care & Professional Excellence

Surya Dental Care was founded on the principle that exceptional dental work and genuine patient care should go hand-in-hand. Our team, led by Dr. P. Senthil Kumar, MDS, is dedicated to creating a positive and reassuring experience for every person who walks through our doors. We believe in building trust through clear communication, professional expertise, and a truly welcoming atmosphere, ensuring your visit is as comfortable as it is effective.

We are proud to serve the Tiruchirappalli community with a full range of dental services in a state-of-the-art, calming clinic environment.

What Our Patients Say

We are honored to have earned the trust of our community. Here is what some of our patients have to share.

"After my previous disappointing visit, I am happy to share that my last two appointments at the clinic were completely different—in the best way. Both appointments were handled with..."

- Ravi Vasudevan

"Highly recommend! I have LOTS of anxiety about going to the dentist. After this visit. (Dr. Nehla)(Dr.p.senthil kumar,MDS) was courteous friendly and professional..."

- Usha S

"First of all, I would like to thank Dr. Senthil Sir & the entire team at Surya Dental Care. I first came here in February for a teeth cleaning. A few mo..."

- Mahalakshmi
